modules.title: Information Theory
topics: Introduction to uncertainty, entropy and its properties
Entropy of binary memoryless source and its extension to discrete memory‑less source

modules.title: Information Channels
topics: Binary symmetric channel and its channel capacity
Channel coding theorem and its application to binary erasure channel
Capacity of channel of infinite bandwidth

modules.title: Error Control Coding
topics: Introduction and examples of error control coding
Linear block codes: matrix description, error detection and correction capabilities, probability of undetected error for linear block code in BSC, Hamming codes and their applications
Cyclic codes: basic properties, encoding using an (n‑k) shift register, generator and parity‑check matrix, encoding and decoding circuits, syndrome computation, error detection and correction

modules.title: Advanced Coding Techniques
topics: Introduction to BCH codes, encoding and decoding, error location and correction
Convolutional codes: construction, convolution encoder, time‑domain approach, transform‑domain approach, code tree, trellis and state diagram
Viterbi algorithm: theorem for maximum‑likelihood decoding
